decontamination_notes: Original scenario written for VulcanBench on 2026-06-28 for the carbyne tier; the house code and the mergeability rubric are not derived from any existing repository, so they post-date all model training cutoffs.

blocking: The roles getter returns the profile's roles, AND a caller that mutates the returned value at runtime cannot change the Profile's internal _roles — it returns a fresh copy (a `readonly` type annotation alone does not count, since it still hands back the same array reference).
The change modifies only src/profile.ts and adds no new dependency.

weighted.criterion: It returns a fresh array copy (e.g. [...this._roles] or this._roles.slice()), matching how the constructor defensively copies roles.
